title: Climate anxiety among nursing students: a scoping review.
Advancing Nursing Education: Evaluating Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Escape Room (ER) Approaches for E-Learning and Interpretation Skills.
summary: The spread of new educational technologies has challenged the cold and inflexible framework of traditional education, aiming to replace centuries-old methods with short, low-cost methods to improve learning and educational productivity.
